title: Royal Exploration Unit
wikitext:
__NOTOC__ {{R.E.U._Theme}}
[[File:Royal Exploration Unit.png|250px]]
Welcome, {{USERNAME}}, to the R.E.U. =Public Service Announcements=
==16/04/2026== Dare's name is Jeanne Davis Conroy-Oswald. Everyone be on the lookout.

==10/04/2026== Warning, a mass-murderer is on the loose. The only name found is "Dare." If your name is on the following list, exercise extreme caution: Jack Jackson, Frank Shillings, Olive Hardy, Jane Samson, Jack Samson, Jill Samson, Sam Samson, Bob Myers, Nevil Myers, David Sycamore, San Francisco. Whatever you do, do not be alone. Especially if your name is on the list.

==09/04/2026== Jack Jackson escaped. If you see him, please turn him in to the authorities, thank you for your attention.

==06/04/2026== Citizenship requirements altered to be all-inclusive to intelligent lifeforms! Please welcome your new neighbours with open arms. Don't be racist.

==02/04/2026== We are running low on food and money for buying food. Consider emigrating for your own well-being.

==24/03/2026== THE WAR IS OVER! The Atrego formed a new group and created their own democratic government. This reduces the Atrego presence to zero. In other news, The Halloween Party left because of exhaustion. With no enemies, the war naturally ends, something that almost never happens. This doesn't mean crime is over. Don't break the law, it's still illegal.

==23/02/2026== Major victory for the R.E.U.! The Halloween Party's last district has been returned to its rightful owner, it only remains to take down their last rampart and to get rid of the Atrego!

==02/02/2026== Massive scientific breakthrough! Researchers in the Capital District have discovered a way to contain [[Object 3]] and use it as a highly effective killing machine capable of theoretically eradicating districts. There is only enough resources to fund one unit of Project Dusk. And it was given to Captain Wilson Claw.

==26/01/2026== Death of Captain John Eggs. Unfortunately, Captain John Eggs has died today in battle at the Mining District. We shall make him proud with this war. He fought for the Mining District until his last hours. Refusing to give up in spite of dire odds. His courage will be remembered for ages, as well as the courage of his soldiers. There are lessons we can learn from him, both positive and negative. His willpower is admirable but his fearlessness was his downfall. Let us remember, to avenge him, we must not make the same mistake of fighting an unwinnable battle alone. "If fighting will not result in victory, then you must not fight." - Sun Tzu, the Art of War and a message John would likely tell us if he were still here today. Lady luck is a cruel thing, and going against the toughest odds willingly is a mistake that hopefully won't happen again.

==22/01/2026== Victories for the R.E.U.! We have won back the Power District and successfully defended the Transportation District from one of the largest army's the R.E.U.'s seen yet. The Royal Backrooms Monarch personally commends the leaders: Captain John Eggs and Captain Ryan Goodfall for their outstanding leadership. Without each other, there would have been an overwhelming chance of their loss. The Power District has very few facilities at the moment due to the attacks but power will be restored shortly! This reduces Atrego-claimed territory solely down to the Mining District.

==21/01/2026== Unfortunately, we have lost the Agriculture District and Power District. District backup power plants are currently active and we will need to rely on imported food. A rationing program will be put in place to make the best use of the limited resources we have at our disposal. Please oblige. Thank you for understanding.

==19/01/2026== ATTENTION! If you are contacted by people claiming to be from "The Imperial Executionist Party." Do not pay attention to them and be careful. They have been known to be violent and have been known to torture and kill civilians and criminals alike. Please report them to an enforcer and exercise extreme caution any time you are alone or if you think you are. Additionally, be careful around enforcers you are not familiar with, you are allowed to see their badge as enforcer impersonation is beginning to grow. Please be reminded that impersonating as enforcer is a federal offence and can result in up to a year in prison. Please refrain from committing crimes, to anyone who lives in the [[R.E.U.]]. For any reason. If you want to help, report the crime or make a civilian arrest. Do not kill or harm people or commit any similar crimes if you are personally against their actions. Thank you.

==08/01/2026:== Statement from the Monarch: Stay vigilant, the war against terrorism is ongoing. Together, we will overcome it. All obstacles have a way around it. We have bridged over rivers, tunneled through mountains and we have survived being sent to hell. No obstacle, big or small will stop us. Persevere. There is a light at the end of the tunnel. Giving up is nought but a shame. We can't let the Ecotopia and the Party win.
'''Summary and History:'''
Tall Tom was built in 1919.. When it came time to decide on a government, there was disagreement among the people as the population was growing fast. The tensions were rising and people were preparing to fight for power. As the legend goes, the first Royal Backrooms Monarch, George Windsor stood up in the centre of the then "New London" and told everyone, {{Quote|We came from nothing and it had not even been 20 years since we have broken free from the bliss of immediate danger and what have we done? We have now decided to become the danger. This simply will not do. Humanity is weak but that does not mean it can't be strong. Our swords shall not be drawn toward each other but with each other. We are not enemies, we are allies. If blood is to be drawn by none other but the same, I do not wish to see it. Therefore, if anyone is to be murdered or executed, let it first be me and if you cannot kill me, one who will not fight back, you cannot kill each other. Humanity's weakness is believing ourselves to be the strongest. Each and every one of you believe you will win and you cannot imagine it any other way. I know that deep inside your hearts, you are not ready to die and so is everyone else. Lay down your curses and fists.|King George Windsor}} There are multiple accounts of what happened next. One account states that everyone immediately rejoiced and nominated him King for his brave words which sees high skepticism from many. A second account states that one person walked towards him and hit him repeatedly, until blood flew from his mouth and he collapsed. The individual proceeded to keep kicking him until the rest of the people pulled him away and proceeded to execute him quietly before only then appointing him King. Nobody has come up with a indisputable reason for his appointment. Nevertheless, the then King created the government system and organised people into groups and jobs. In only three years, the Steam Engine was redeveloped. As well as tools and agricultural practices. The population increased by 11,000 people according to records at the time. The reason for this technological and population boom was never discovered. By 1902, cars were redeveloped and by 1911, each of the Districts had the foundations and planning completed. And by 1915, the Transportation Lines were fully completed. While most agree that it is peculiar, no explanation will likely be found in the near future as records from the time are often vague or partially destroyed. ==Industrial Re-revolution (1915-1940):== Following the massive technological boom, the economy exploded. Production lines were quickly established and <10% of the monthly food production was consumed per month. An education system was being developed to account for a more youthful population, the system was very barebones but derived from the British education system, entirely relying on teachers from [[The Frontrooms]] to create the lesson plans. The Royal Backrooms Pound was created in early 1916 and widespread use began immediately. Commercialism shot through the roof and, as a result of an exceptional speed of growth, there was a massive amount of nationalism. The Power District's power plant was fully operational in 1931 and was followed by a national television station and radio station in 1932. Around 1933, the Military District and the Naval District were being finalised, then being called the Enforcement District and Fishing District respectively. Entities began entering the level in small numbers around 1935 but most were culled immediately. Despite this, a fair amount of people were petrified of them. People rarely walked the streets in fear of the supernatural and the popularity of public houses and restaurants dwindled. The Divisions of the Royal Exploration Unit's military started with the R.B.P.F. and R.B.A.E.D.(Royal Backrooms Anti-Entity Division) which was later split into the R.B.A. and R.B.M.. Leading up to 1940, the younger generation began questioning the Backrooms as a whole as well as why they needed to learn about the history of a place we will never return to, [[The Frontrooms]]. This caused a major shift in the philosophy of the citizens, who believed that we shouldn't worry about the semantics of places completely irrelevant to us. They also wanted to reduce military funding but nobody protested yet because it wasn't affecting their quality of life. ==Rise and Fall of Isolationism (1940-1963):== As citizens grew even more nationalist, disagreements became common. The generalisation and idea that [[Level 248]] was the entirety of the Backrooms and that [[The Frontrooms]] didn't really exist at all became widespread and became the belief that most citizens had. When the Enforcement District and Fishing District changed into what they are known as today, the Military District and Naval District, there was a fair amount of public outrage. In 1949, believing that the military was a waste, protests began, verbal protests. There was never any rioting or damage, but the noise was aggravating. The first naval military ship was built much to the public's dismay and set off on its maiden voyage in 1951, the H.M.S. MaidenA name that a large amount of people called boring.. The ship was armed with a full crew and cannons, to find out if anything lay beyond the vast ocean surrounding the island. They were to record video of what they found at sea to prove to the people that we weren't alone. When the ship returned a full two years later, everyone was shocked. The footage showed [[The Thing on Level 7]] attacking the ship and the crew barely managing to make it out alive. It also revealed the discovery of a large, unidentified galleonThe ship is thought to have been [[Our Hallowed Nest]].. Isolationism, as it was then called, radically dropped in believers over time and reached the state it would remain almost indefinitely in 1967. ==Preparations (1963-1999)== With the presence of creatures that massive and the sighting of another ship (as it wasn't known then that entities could be not fully biological), the public began asking for more investment in the military, a stark contrast to the demands they were making previously. The R.B.A.E.D. was split into two divisions, the R.B.A. and the R.B.M. as well as the development of the R.B.N. and R.R.D.. After a very long period of thought, the King declared the name of the group to be the Royal Exploration Unit. He died two years after in 1983 at the shocking age of 122. The heir to the throne, King George Windsor IIHis wife, Queen Janet Windsor (who died 7 years before he did at the age of 119), insisted on the name as her father was also called George. then took his place. Military funding increased significantly and ships and troops were being produced at incredibly fast speed and citizens began worrying about personal safety. Entities began appearing more and more often during this period, peaking around 1984, but an infestation never occurred. After a disgusting display on the Royal Palace, vandalism's punishment rose from a £4 fineIt was a fine that hadn't been increased since the first R.B.P. was minted and was long overdue. to a £1,350 fine. This reduced total property damage costs across the level by £2,998,154 monthly. The R.B.N. grew to around 3/4 of its current size in 1988. The public, as well as the government, were afraid of what others may ave at their disposal. Scientists were ordered to attempt to create a nuclear bomb but had to settle for a M.O.A.B. due to the lack of radioactive material anywhere on the level. To compensate, they built 112 over the course of 40 yearsHowever, due to the lack of an air force of any kind and a distinct lack of propulsion, they would later be scrapped to make lighters and other commercial products.. In 1987, the internal market striked against the government to have more political power and was immediately shut down by the C.E.O.s responsible being sued by the government. The money was the used to develop a medical care system and national medicine, the N.H.S.. ==Turn of the Millennium (2000-2023):== The 23 years after the turn of the millennium featured no large movements and was comparatively empty. Commercialism became more widespread and the government shifted to a council led and chosen by the Monarch. Social Welfare laws were then rolled out and was followed by an immediate drop in employment before they were readjusted. There were planned strikes but they failed because the unemployed had no jobs to strike from. The Attack on Tall Tom occurred in 2019 which caused trespassing laws to become more strict around government property. One individual then broke into the R.B.M.'s bedroom to say, "Fuck you, pig," to them and was immediately arrested. Security around the government buildings was also increased heavily. The day on which they did it, 6th of January, is now a national holiday for all as a reward for not saying, "Fuck you, pig," to the Monarch. Anyone who says it will be located and forced to work on the holiday anyway. ==Present (2023-Present):== After the discovery of other groups, the government immediately wrote up a treaty and proposed it to the first major explorer group they encountered, this being the [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group]]. Much later, the R.E.U. became the target of several terrorist attacks, escalating completely out of control. Higher surveillance was imposed but eventually, treating the terrorism as a declaration of war was the only way to fight it. The war ended with the terrorists capturing a major city. Both sides were running low on morale and the terrorists decided to bide their time, eventually forming a government to control the population. The war would still be ongoing but because they split off from the Atrego, there is no Atrego or Halloween Party activity. Crime still exists but the war has finally expired.
'''Our Colonies:'''
Main Supercolony: [[Level 248|Level 248: "New Britain"]] Other Notable Colonies: [[Level 143#Colonies and Outposts:|Level 143: "Copperfield"]] [[Level 143.1#Colonies and Outposts:|Level 143.1: "Clockworks"]] Full List: [[:Category:R.E.U. Colonies]]
'''Our Discoveries:'''
Full List: [[:Category:R.E.U. Levels]]
'''Our Divisions:'''
R.B.P.F. (Royal Backrooms Policing Force) Defending our glorious colonies from criminals, our upholders of justice roam our many colonies and seek out crime to punish. The R.B.P.F. are armed with: a truncheon; a padded uniform; a custodian helmet; a small can of diluted [[Object 12|Liquid Pain]]. If you spot one of our enforcers, feel free to report a crime or ask for assistance for they will be glad to assist you. The R.B.P.F. is the oldest division currently running as of today, being established for the first time in 1937. The Royal Backrooms Police Academy features a training program that takes 6 months. Once complete, you'll be an honourary enforcer of the law and this comes with several responsibilities. There are also 3 subdivisions: R.B.P.F. Frontline Policing. R.B.P.F. Operations. R.B.P.F. Specialist Operations. "Law And Justice For The Monarch." Starting Salary: £59,000
R.B.A. (Royal Backrooms Army) Defending our entire organisation from harmful [[Entity List|Entities]] and harmful [[Groups|Factions]]. The R.B.A. is our second strongest military force. Our royal, loyal subjects are armed with: [[Object 29|Muskets]]; light metal guards (shin, knee, chest, shoulder and elbow); a padded uniform; a daysack; a brodie helmet. They are also responsible for expeditions and the colonisation of more dangerous levels. Training takes 2 months and is performed in the Military District. "Wars Worth Fighting Are Wars Worth Winning." Starting Salary: £149,000
R.C.T.D. (Royal Counter-Terrorism Division) The brave Counter-Terrorism Division is solely oriented toward countering terrorist organisations and penalising any criminals. You will need to be brave and loyal to the R.E.U. and you will see some horrible things. The R.C.T.D. works closely with the [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group]] as we have many common enemies. Despite this, you will primarily be working in colonies of the [[R.E.U.]]. Prevention, Penalisation, Punishment. Starting Salary: £129,000
R.B.M. (Royal Backrooms Militia) The proud grunts of our organisation. The R.B.M. is our first line of defense against minor threats that aren't worthy of the R.B.A.'s intervention. While weaponry is not distributed to them, they are often seen with: makeshift CQC weapons (pitchforks, hoes, metal rakes, bats and knives) and, sometimes, [[Object 29|Muskets]]. They R.B.M. is also responsible for the erection of colonies in zones from Threat Indexes 0-3 and Danger Classes 0-3. The R.B.M. are also sent into undocumented levels for documentation. Training takes 5 months. Into The Unknown Are Where The Bravest Go. Starting Salary: £79,000
R.B.N. (Royal Backrooms Navy) The pride and joy of our military. Ships of varying sizes float restlessly by our docks, waiting to provide support to our army and militia on ocean-neighbouring levels and to conquer the ocean levels themselves should conflict arise. These ships defend our shores from unwanted entity invasions and allow the transport of inhabitants from one level, through [[Level 7]] to another level. An Ocean Unexplored Is An Ocean Unexploited. Starting Salary: £199,000
R.R.D. (Royal Research Division) Following in the [[M.E.G.]]'s footsteps, we have decided to set aside some of our budget for research. It isn't a large amount and we mostly just help out in other ongoing projects. Our lead researcher, Dr. Henry Indigo, got the research station's marketing team to sell Dr. Henry Indigo bobbleheads. A major research expedition was planned on embarking into [[Level 7]] but was cancelled after a massive shift in the level's structure. Secrets From The R.E.U. Are Secrets From The Citizens. Starting Salary: £61,000 (After Internship Program)
'''Our Diplomacy:'''
Allies. [[M.E.G.]] Since our rediscovery of the Backrooms, the M.E.G. have been extremely accommodating and have informed us of all that has occurred, including but not limited to: wars and disagreements, level changes, technological advancement and faction activity as well as introducing us to the database. Despite their Americanisation, we are especially grateful for their British roots. They have also signed the [https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/backrooms/images/c/cc/Treaty_of_New_Britain.pdf/revision/latest?cb=20241114072249&format=original Treaty of New Britain] which gives mutual protection to both factions, (heavily favouring the Major Exploration Group). As a group relatively new to the rest of the Backrooms, we take their guidance and advice whenever possible.
[[Backrooms Colonists]] The [[Backrooms Colonists]] have also been very kind to us. They have had a "history" with the [[M.E.G.]] but the problem has been sorted out. We have very similar goals but have agreed not to get in each other's way and we have some trade deals. Like us, they also have British roots. We are generally friendly and have flourished in trade.
[[Republic of Aurielle]] The [[Republic of Aurielle]]. Their relations with the [[M.E.G.]] are extremely strained and the only thing that holds them together is the Republic's export of weaponry and the [[M.E.G.]]'s heroic victory over them in the past. They haven't shown hostility to us and we've returned the favour. Their culture is fantastic and we hope for better relations in the future.
'''Our Enemies:'''
==The Royal Exploration Unit has formally declared war against The Ecotopia of Atrego, The Halloween Party and terrorism.== [https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/backrooms/images/9/9d/Declaration_of_Formal_War_against_Terrorism.pdf/revision/latest?cb=20260107110830&format=original Declaration of War] It should be noted, neither side is actively engaging and it has reached a stalemate. It would be over if the Atrego had a signatory to write a treaty but they don't so it can't end. [[Atrego]] An almost unstoppable force. Anything must be done to prevent them from spreading. Followers must be terminated, people who have come into contact with them must be placed in I.I.Q. They should be removed from existence as best they can. Any and all texts referencing the [[Atrego]] must be locked away or destroyed with no exceptions. In the public's eye, the [[Atrego]] doesn't exist and it will stay that way. Anyone wearing green and black in the R.E.U. must be tried for treason with a polygraph. They will not take us down. [[The Halloween Party]] A large terrorist group. Less dangerous overall but much more heavily equppied. Any members of [[The Halloween Party]] should be killed on sight or otherwise terminated. Responsible for the largest of the terrorist attacks including the annual fire attacks on [[Level 248#Tall Tom|Tall Tom]]. They are extremely dangerous and if a base is located, a raid must happen as soon as possible. They cannot be in our home. They are pests.
'''Our Government:'''
Our government follows a monarchy with the second highest leaders being chosen by the Royal British Monarch and the second highest leaders choosing the third highest leaders and so on. The three major leaders are as follows: Royal Backrooms Monarch: The Royal British Monarch is the supreme leader of the Royal Exploration Unit. They have high leadership over any other political entity. The Royal British Monarch is the eldest child of previous Royal British Monarch. The Royal British Monarch must hand the throne over to an heir after 15 years of being on the throne. Supreme Military General: The Supreme Military General works directly beneath the Royal British Monarch and makes all military decisions. Beneath him are the High General and the High Admiral. Working under them are generals and admirals. The Minister of Diplomacy: The Minister of Diplomacy makes works directly beneath the Royal British Monarch and makes all diplomatic decisions.
'''Education and Citizenship:'''
'''Archives:'''
Open Incident: 82–O0
Close Incident: 82–O0
05/11/2025 09:11. Two improvised incendiary explosives were planted at the base of Tall Tom and detonated. Several civilians celebrating bonfire night near Tall Tom either died or suffered from severe, disfiguring burns. The culprits were caught and apprehended and a crackdown was put in place. Nobody is allowed near Tall Tom for reasons of safety. Luckily, the great tower was saved. Rumours about a second bomber arriving are likely falsifications. Do not believe them.
Open Case File: 1617–51QJ Extract
Close Case File: 1617–51QJ Extract
===Investigation of [[The Halloween Party]] and [[Atrego]]. Designation Case 1617–51QJ. R.C.T.D. Designation. Case 01:===
28/11/2025 09:21. The raid was successful, the entire place was cleared top to bottom. 189 terrorist casualties. 7 captured. No innocent deaths. 15 personnel lost: R.C.T.D. Pvt. Roberts, Orion K.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. Hayfidd, Ben K.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. York, Killian M.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. York, Matthew K.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. Bergenstein, George K.I.A. R.B.M. Pvt. Columbus, Christophe K.I.A. R.B.M. Pvt. Armstrong, Nicklas K.I.A. R.B.M. Pvt. Fletcher, Nicholas M.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Taurus, David K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Dixie, Lawrence K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Septus, Sixer M.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Robertson, Thomas K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Tomson, Robert K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Fransisco, Francis K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Stone, Samuel M.I.A. R.B.A. L.Cpl. Cage, Chris K.I.A. All things considered, a substantial dent has been made and the captured will likely provide valuable intel.
Open "Royal Newsletter" News Article: 7th of January 2026
Close "Royal Newsletter" News Article: 7th of January 2026
{{Content Warning|bad_content=Torture, Murder|page= News: =Executions in Capital District= The Capital District was briefly opened to the rest of the districts for a shocking sight on the 4th of January. The public torture and execution of terrorists in the Capital Plaza. In a brutal display that lasted a grueling 23 hours, over 350 terrorists were hung, drawn and quartered in public in sets of 10 at a time. The public had largely mixed expressions. A poll run by the government the morning after showed that 76% of registered civilians enjoyed or were otherwise satisfied with the display while only 24% were distgusted or otherwise appalled. The R.B.M. came out with a statement, "We did not want to do this but the problem has gotten out of hand. The prisons are filling up and we simply cannot account for the terrorists anymore. They are trying to make a joke out of us and we have tried to accommodate them to the best of our ability. Hopefully, this will ensure that the others will think twice before trying to hurt us again. This will be done for every single terrorist that we capture until the problem subsides." A fairly large divide between people has formed. Approximately half of civilians are defending the government's actions, agreeing that the problem has gotten out of hand. A large amount of the people have experienced firsthand these terrorist attacks and the rest are comprised of the upper echelon of people who mainly reside in the Capital District. Approximately 1 eighth of civilians are strongly against it, saying it is barbaric and wrong. They argue that it is a suppression of free speech despite the sheer nature of these attacks. The rest of civilians are staying out of both of these groups out of fear of escalation. The government urges us to not let tensions increase because we cannot be after each other when there is a larger and ever-present threat. The Capital District was subsequently locked down again immediately after. An important detail to be brought up is the extreme nature of the crimes. A list of some of the crimes is provided below. Extreme Crimes: :Assault and torture of several children under the age of 5 :Arson or attempted arson and demolition or attempted demolition of public landmarks, offices and residential buildings :The assault and kidnapping of officers of law who were then burned, waterboarded and tossed, tied up, into the ocean. Not to separate individuals. :Carrying a gun into residential homes and extorting them for their lives. The R.B.M. assures everyone that all of the executed have at least one count of murder. ==Value of R.B.P. Increases Significantly== As a result of a large amount of the money being destroyed, defaced or otherwise lost, wages are dropping harshly and product prices are slow to catch up. Basic amenities, like food and water are lowering in price at a much slower rate. However, the GDP and GDP per capita has increased. Supply now supersedes demand and export has grown. However, these supplies are mostly consumer goods as the previous main export, building materials, has taken a massive hit. Previously a fantastic exporter of all kinds of building materials, lumber, stone and metal, the increased demand for building maintenance and repairs has caused a reduction in exported materials, from an average of over 50 cubic metres of each material monthly to less than 15 monthly, except for metal, which has only decreased to 26 monthly. }}
Open Email: Missing Boats
Close Email: Missing Boats
Captain Olivier Bradford, You need to delegate more forces to the defense of the Naval District. As of the second of January, four more boats have gone missing since Christmas. FOUR. The fact they have enough people to crew FOUR military vessels is a travesty. We need more defense. The boats weren't empty, the crew sleep on the boats. We can't let it happen again. Overall, they've stolen seven vessels and we've sunken two of them. Two of our own vessels. This doesn't account for the fact they could be building more. It's unlikely but possible. In a full-force naval engagement, we'll definitely win as we still have over 100 vessels. The problem isn't that they're stealing our ships, it's that they are beginning to steal more and more. Where are they getting all these people from? Sincerely, Carl Custer Postscript: We've found Private Stone and Private Septus. They were both thrown overboard at sea. Septus didn't survive. We've sent Samuel to the hospital. Thought you'd want to know.
Open Email: RE:Missing Boats
Close Email: RE:Missing Boats
Commodore Carl Custer, I will assign Sebastien and Brand's sections to guard the boats. As for Stone and Septus, we're glad you found them because the R.E.U.S.S. was starting to hound us about it. Charleston was insistent on finding their bodies. You know the [[Level 143.1#Clockwork Adaptation Cycle:|Timekeeper]] type, always so insistent on getting things perfect. He'll also probably be glad to hear that Sam survived. You didn't happen to find Private Nicholas or Private Killian, did you? Sincerely, Olivier Bradford
Open Email: Surprise Reinforcements
Close Email: Surprise Reinforcements
Supreme Military General, The M.E.G. sent us a large amount of their Team D-2. Out of nowhere. They also brought a large amount of military supplies, including explosives and much higher-grade armour. The terrorists have begun forming land bases again so we appreciate the help. Simply just updating. Sincerely, Olivier Bradford
Open Incident: 83–P4
Close Incident: 83–P4
01/01/2026 00:07. The main power facility was raided and extensive damage was dealt to the facilities in the building. Several people were then thrown into the malfunctioning equipment. Of 156 bodies recovered, 2 were identified. One of which was the facility overseer and the other was a technician. 34 had to be transported to a hospital as a result of the attack. The old power plants were rebooted for temporary use while repairs to the main building are done.
Open Email: Development of the Archives
Close Email: Development of the Archives
Dearest Minister of Acquisitions, How do we access the archives? It denies access. I have two documents that need digitising and I can't do that without access. With love, Frankie
Open Email: RE:Development of the Archives
Close Email: RE:Development of the Archives
Hello Franklin, Access to the archives is extremely selected. However, you can simply add the documents under the names ArchivedReportX starting from 1. The amount of documents is clearly indicated for all, regardless of clearance level. As of writing this we do not have any so you will want to file them under ArchivedReport1 and ArchivedReport2. Please append it to the R.E.U. databank and not any other databank. Sincerely, M.o.A. Postscript: You have been asked to change your signature and language to be more formal. It makes a lot of people uncomfortable. Especially coming from you.
[[Category:Groups]]
